agents.name: context-builder
agents.purpose: Analyzes requirements and codebase, generates context and meta-prompt

agents.name: delegate
agents.purpose: Lightweight subagent that inherits the parent model with no default reads

agents.name: planner
agents.purpose: Creates implementation plans from context and requirements

agents.name: researcher
agents.purpose: Autonomous web researcher — searches, evaluates, and synthesizes a focused research brief

agents.name: reviewer
agents.purpose: Code review specialist that validates implementation and fixes issues

agents.name: scout
agents.purpose: Fast codebase recon that returns compressed context for handoff

agents.name: researcher
agents.purpose: Autonomous web researcher — searches, evaluates, and synthesizes a focused research brief

agents.name: reviewer
agents.purpose: General code review — parent specifies what to review and what to look for

agents.name: scout
agents.purpose: Fast codebase recon that returns compressed context for handoff

agents.name: workhorse
agents.purpose: Repetitive execution agent — bulk edits, boilerplate, mechanical refactors, apply-this-everywhere tasks

notes: User-defined agents override built-in agents of the same name.
Do not guess agent names. Only names in this manifest are valid.
Do not guess model overrides. Use the default model unless the user explicitly requests one.
